params.name: location
params.description: Geographic area to search. Required if latitude and longitude are not provided.

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the search center. Required if location is not provided.

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the search center. Required if location is not provided.

params.name: term
params.description: Search term, such as "food" or a business name.

params.name: radius
params.description: Search radius in meters. Maximum 40000.

params.name: categories
params.description: Comma-delimited list of category aliases to filter by.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

params.name: price
params.description: Comma-delimited list of price levels (1, 2, 3, 4).

params.name: open_now
params.description: Return only businesses open at the time of the request.

params.name: open_at
params.description: Return businesses open at the given Unix timestamp.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Comma-delimited list of business attributes to filter by.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort mode for results.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of results to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset into the list of returned results.

items.docs: Returns up to 240 businesses based on the provided search criteria. Either location or a latitude/longitude pair is required.

params.name: phone
params.description: Phone number in the form +[country code][number], e.g. +14159083801.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns businesses associated with the given phone number.

params.name: name
params.description: Business name.

params.name: address1
params.description: First line of the business address.

params.name: address2
params.description: Second line of the business address.

params.name: address3
params.description: Third line of the business address.

params.name: city
params.description: City of the business.

params.name: state
params.description: ISO 3166-2 state code of the business.

params.name: country
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the business.

params.name: postal_code
params.description: Postal/ZIP code of the business.

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the business.

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the business.

params.name: phone
params.description: Phone number of the business.

params.name: yelp_business_id
params.description: A Yelp business id hint to improve match accuracy.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of matches to return.

params.name: match_threshold
params.description: How strictly candidates must match the input.

items.docs: Matches the supplied business attributes against businesses on Yelp, returning the best candidate matches. Useful for resolving your own records to a Yelp business id.

params.name: business_id_or_alias
params.description: A 22-character Yelp business id or a business alias.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a business by Yelp id or alias.

params.name: text
params.value: Best tacos in the Bay Area. The al pastor is incredible and the salsa bar is unmatched.
params.description: Text to return autocomplete suggestions for.

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the location to look for suggestions in.

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the location to look for suggestions in.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns autocomplete suggestions for search terms, businesses, and categories.

params.name: business_id_or_alias
params.description: A 22-character Yelp business id or a business alias.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of reviews to return.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset into the list of returned reviews.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort mode for reviews.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns up to three review excerpts for a business.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns the full list of Yelp business categories.

params.name: alias
params.description: The category alias, e.g. "restaurants".

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns details for a single Yelp category by alias.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset into the list of returned events.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of events to return.

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort direction.

params.name: sort_on
params.description: Field to sort events on.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Unix timestamp lower bound for event start time.

params.name: end_date
params.description: Unix timestamp upper bound for event start time.

params.name: categories
params.description: Comma-delimited list of event category aliases.

params.name: is_free
params.description: Filter for free events.

params.name: location
params.description: Geographic area to search for events.

params.name: latitude
params.description: Latitude of the search center.

params.name: longitude
params.description: Longitude of the search center.

params.name: radius
params.description: Search radius in meters. Maximum 40000.

params.name: excluded_events
params.description: Comma-delimited list of event ids to exclude.

items.docs: Returns events based on the provided search criteria.

params.name: event_id
params.description: The id of the event to retrieve.

params.name: locale
params.description: Locale in the form {language}_{country}, e.g. en_US.

items.docs: Returns details for a single event by id.
Sends a natural language query to the Yelp Fusion AI and returns a conversational response plus structured business entities. Supports multi-turn conversations via chat_id.
